AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description: Provides tools for managing chat conversations, searching contacts, and initiating calls. Operational Patterns: - Resolution of contacts via 'searchContacts' provides the required 'endpointValue' for sending messages or making calls. - Passing a blank query to 'searchContacts' retrieves the most recent contacts. Constraints: - Message content cannot be empty or blank. - Calls can be initiated by either contact name or unique identifier. - Media attachments are supported via a list of URIs.
